creator: murray@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

New RSS 2.0 feeds have been added.  The website will be updated within 
12 hours with these new feeds going live.  There will not be links 
from the home page, but if you visit: 

http://www.FreeBSD.org/events 
or 
http://www.FreeBSD.org/news/press.html 

then you will see an RSS logo in the right side of the location bar of 
your browser, and an RSS link beneath the left side navigation bar. 

Thanks for the suggestion!
